<!--
  Thanks for contributing to Tokens United. Please complete the sections below.
  Keep it concise — reviewers value clarity over length.
-->

## Summary

-
-

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — adding or updating tests
- [ ] chore — tooling, build, or maintenance

## Test plan

- [ ] Manually verified the change in the running app
- [ ] Added or updated automated tests
- [ ] All affected user roles / permissions checked

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or credentials are committed
- [ ] Follows the repo's architecture and coding style rules
- [ ] Lint, type-check and tests pass locally
- [ ] RBAC / permissions respected where relevant
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
